title: Causal Receipts
description: Generic receipt/outcome projection for causally-linked commands or effect requests. This is not a transport ACK plane; observed/accepted are non-terminal, applied/rejected are terminal.

ReceiptOutcome.description: Outcome vocabulary. observed/accepted are non-terminal; applied/rejected are terminal.

receipt_id.description: Idempotency key for this receipt event.

causation_id.description: Stable id of the command, event, or effect request this receipt observes.

observer.description: Peer, process, or subsystem that produced the receipt.

generation.description: Producer/editor generation. Consumers discard receipts outside the current generation for the causation id.
